memberdef.name: default_pairs
memberdef.initializer: = { {MBOX_CORE_RPU0, MBOX_CORE_APU}, {MBOX_CORE_APU, MBOX_CORE_RPU0}, {MBOX_CORE_RPU1, MBOX_CORE_APU}, {MBOX_CORE_APU, MBOX_CORE_RPU1}, {MBOX_CORE_RPU2, MBOX_CORE_APU}, {MBOX_CORE_APU, MBOX_CORE_RPU2}, {MBOX_CORE_RPU3, MBOX_CORE_APU}, {MBOX_CORE_APU, MBOX_CORE_RPU3}, }

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t base_addr, uint32_t channel_index, uint32_t item_size, uint32_t item_total, uint32_t alignment)
memberdef.name: get_channel_base_addr

briefdescription.para: Calculate memory address for a specific channel based on adjacent layout.

memberdef.argsstring: (MboxCoreId core_id, uint32_t shm_start_addr, uint32_t item_size, uint32_t item_total)
memberdef.name: mbox_mem_map

briefdescription.para: Setup shared memory using adjacent-pair layout matching NEW_RPU.
Initialize a Mbox and register the FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: point for succeed, NULL for failure

briefdescription.para: Post meg to the designated receiver.
Broadcast msg to all other known cores.
Read meg from the designated sender.
Reset the designated FIFO with id to specify.
Check designated FIFO is full or not.
Check designated FIFO is empty or not.
